info.description:
This documentation covers v2 API endpoints.

Authenticated requests must include an X-JWT-Token header with a token retrieved with the following authenticated call to VCF Operation API : 

POST /suite-api/api/auth/token/exchange 

Request body {"serviceKeys": ["ops-li"]}.

Access is allowed only to resources that the user is authorized to use.
info.title: Log Management API

200.description: Agent group config with id retrieved successfully

get.summary: Get agent group config by ID

200.description: Agent group config is patched successfully

patch.summary: Patch (partial update) an agent group config

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of all agent secrets configured in the system.
The response includes secret names and metadata but does not include the actual secret values.

Supports pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.

post.description:
Creates a new agent secret that can be used by log ingestion agents to authenticate
with the system. The secret name must be unique and will be used to identify the agent.
The returned secret value should be stored securely as it will only be displayed once.
post.summary: Create a secret to be used by ingestion agent

post.description:
Exchange a secret for a token. The Time-To-Live (TTL) is specified in **milliseconds**
and must be between a **minimum of 1 minute (60,000 ms)** and a
**maximum of 180 days (15,552,000,000 ms)**.
If not provided or zero, the system defaults to 30 minutes (1,800,000 ms).
post.summary: Create a session to be used by log ingestion agents

post.description:
Revokes an existing agent secret, making it immediately invalid for authentication.
Any agents configured to use this secret will no longer be able to authenticate with
the system.

This action cannot be undone - to restore access, a new secret must be created.

This action does not invalidate any previously created token.

The ingestion API has the following limits: 
JSON payload - 1MB,
Log message size - 16KB,
Field name size - 64 characters

The ingestion API has the following limits: 
JSON payload - 1MB,
Log message size - 16KB,
Field name size - 64 characters
